member.name: T:Alphabet.Domain.ValueObjects.Email
member.summary: Represents a validated email address.

member.name: M:Alphabet.Domain.ValueObjects.Email.EmailValidationRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[^@\\s]+@[^@\\s]+\\.[^@\\s]+$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] greedily at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.summary: Represents a message body value object.

member.summary: Represents an immutable money value object.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the EmailValidationRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailValidationRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.
